events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the sequence violation is that alignment was locked in before piping was finally bolted up, and the visible coupling-gap shift after bolt-up is a textbook pipe-strain signature that was never re-verified. Decision is `fail` (high risk) — grouting and guard installation must be held until a pipe-strain check and a fresh laser alignment confirm the machine is within tolerance.
